message:
Make OCSF documentation generation optional like changelog

OCSF reference docs, sidebar, and version config are now fully
conditional. Build succeeds without running generate:ocsf, and the
OCSF section only appears in sidebar when generated content exists.
Generated content files are now gitignored.

Also fix broken cross-reference links in OCSF content by properly
converting object/class names with path separators to URL slugs.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -19,9 +19,9 @@ src/unified-timeline-data.generated.ts
 src/content/docs/reference/claude-plugins/
 
 # OCSF reference (generated content)
-src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/[0-9]*
-src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/faqs/
-src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/articles/
+src/content/docs/reference/ocsf/
+src/sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts
+src/ocsf-version.mjs
 
 # Docs map and bundle (generated)
 public/sitemap.md

@@ -2,7 +2,14 @@ import {
   nodeAPISidebarGroup,
   platformAPISidebarGroup,
 } from "./sidebar-shared-groups.js";
-import { OCSF_VERSION } from "./ocsf-version.mjs";
+
+// Conditionally load OCSF sidebar (generated by sync-ocsf.mjs)
+const ocsfModules = import.meta.glob<{ ocsfSidebar: object }>(
+  "./sidebar-ocsf.generated.ts",
+  { eager: true },
+);
+const ocsfGenerated = Object.values(ocsfModules)[0];
+const ocsfSidebar = ocsfGenerated?.ocsfSidebar ?? null;
 
 export const guides = [
   "guides/quickstart",
@@ -227,19 +234,8 @@ export const reference = [
     label: "Claude Marketplace",
     link: "reference/claude-plugins",
   },
-  {
-    label: "OCSF",
-    collapsed: true,
-    items: [
-      { label: "Overview", link: "reference/ocsf" },
-      { label: "Classes", link: `reference/ocsf/${OCSF_VERSION}/classes` },
-      { label: "Objects", link: `reference/ocsf/${OCSF_VERSION}/objects` },
-      { label: "Profiles", link: `reference/ocsf/${OCSF_VERSION}/profiles` },
-      { label: "Types", link: `reference/ocsf/${OCSF_VERSION}/types` },
-      { label: "FAQs", link: "reference/ocsf/faqs" },
-      { label: "Articles", link: "reference/ocsf/articles" },
-    ],
-  },
+  // OCSF sidebar is conditionally included when generated
+  ...(ocsfSidebar ? [ocsfSidebar] : []),
   {
     label: "Workflows",
     collapsed: true,
